## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Build / CI change

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's design system (Stitch MCP "The Sacred Editorial")
- [ ] No hardcoded colors — all colors come from `src/constants/theme.ts`
- [ ] All screens use `SafeAreaView` from `react-native-safe-area-context`
- [ ] Touch targets are at least 48x48
- [ ] TypeScript strict mode passes (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`yarn lint`)
- [ ] Format passes (`yarn format:check`)
- [ ] Tested on both light and dark themes
- [ ] No new `any` types introduced
